caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up in a bun is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt, black headphones, and a black wristwatch. She sits before a professional microphone and a backdrop featuring a yellow vertical stripe and a screen displaying the name "ohnson". To her left and right, logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" are visible on the screen. A small sign reading "Employees Only" is posted on the wall above the screen. As the sequence progresses, the woman is seen speaking and smiling while gesturing with her left hand. She then shifts her focus to her headphones, reaching up with both hands to adjust them over her ears. The camera remains stationary, capturing her upper body as she interacts with the equipment and reacts during the recording session.
